EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the system via the SSH protocol on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the system via the SSH protocol on ESXi host {datafield4} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} closed a session established via the SSH protocol on ESXi host {datafield4} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system via the SSH protocol on ESXi host {datafield4} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
